events.title: Julieann Thurlow & Jose Cruz | Reading Cooperative Bank
events.description: Thurlow (President and CEO) and Cruz (SVP, Commercial) discussed community banking, housing finance, and MBTA Communities zoning in person. Students discussed their policy briefs, and Thurlow & Cruz provided thoughtful feedback.

events.title: Policy brief presentations | Andrew Mikula
events.description: AES members traveled to Boston to present their spring policy briefs to Pioneer Institute Senior Housing Fellow Andrew Mikula.

events.title: Fed Challenge 2026
events.description: AES participated in the Federal Reserve Bank of New York High School Fed Challenge for the first time, submitting a podcast script titled "The Price of the Pit" to the year's music-themed competition.

photos.alt: Our first Fed Challenge team, after our final in-person meeting.
